rw-shi-yan-shi-shi-yi-ge-bing-chi-dao-li:
RW Lab is a co-creative digital nomad community that adheres to the DAO concept. 
With remote work as the core value, we help users become digital nomads in an all-round way, bringing interesting people together to form a free and symbiotic digital nomad ecosystem.

RW Lab is a co-creative digital nomad community that adheres to the DAO concept. 
With remote work as the core value, we help users become digital nomads in an all-round way, bringing interesting people together to form a free and symbiotic digital nomad ecosystem.
rw-shi-yan-shi-chang-dao-lian-he-quan-qi:
RW Lab advocates uniting digital nomad explorers around the world, including the resources of individuals, teams, companies, and other organizations, to build a digital nomad community. The community currently has the core module of remote work recruitment, and hopes to continue to self-organize and develop a series of related topics. 
The products and services of digital nomads lead more people to join digital nomads and become new citizens of RW Labs.
yong-you-yi-fen-yuan-cheng-gong-zuo-bu-j: Having a remote job is not only an adjuster of work-life balance, but also a stepping stone to becoming a digital nomad and enjoying geographical arbitrage and time arbitrage.

zi-you-zhuan-gao-gen-zuo-jia-you-man-da-:
There is a big difference between freelance writing and writers.   
In freelance writing, what you write is based on the needs of your clients. 
When you are really famous, when your name is everywhere and everyone wants to write for you, then you will become a writer. 
So, conversely speaking, the threshold for freelance writing is not too high. The threshold is quite low, but the upper limit is relatively high.
rw-shi-yan-shi-suo-you-ren-xiang-ba-wo-s: RW Lab | @Everyone I want to tell you
wo-men-yi-zhi-zai-si-kao-rw-de-yi-yi-he-:
We have been thinking about the meaning and value of RW, and also thinking about how to make RW develop better. 
After focusing on the rapid development of our business in the early stage, we would like to choose to stop and sincerely explore more possibilities with you who follow RW.
shuo-lai-su-qi-zhen-de-shi-hen-you-yuan-:
That’s tacky! 
It was really fate that I met RW Lab by chance, got to know various partners with rich ideas, and then I couldn't control it. 
The idea of ​​remote work gradually emerged, and I began to find more than one remote job. I started a semi-resident life full of freshness. I also witnessed the digital nomad journey of many partners. This is probably the case with the same frequency resonance. 
Perhaps it comes from your own most authentic perception. I think that if you want to explore a new way of life, RW Lab can be a telescope that extends the dimension of exploration, or it can be a magnifying glass that helps you observe self-awareness, helping you look inward and outward. 
All achieve better self-realization.
2022-nian-xia-tian-zai-she-jiao-mei-ti-s:
In the summer of 2022, I came across [RW Laboratory] on social media, and this story of everyone being remote began. 
Enter the community and get to know enthusiastic ecological co-builders and skilled community citizens; here, the richness and diversity of work and life are discussed 24 hours a day, and practical KOL topics are shared about experiences and experiences in different countries. 
; In addition, we can obtain high-quality remote work lists every day and every week, and enjoy continuously upgraded digital nomad services on demand...
rw-shi-yan-shi-she-qu-li-de-gong-min-lai:
In RW Lab, citizens in the community come and go, but the content discussed together will continue to settle in the efforts of the co-builders. 
New citizens are always welcome to join, and old citizens are welcome to come home often!
rw-shi-yan-shi-bu-jin-zai-da-zao-yi-ge-s: RW Lab is not only creating a digital nomad ecosystem, but also promoting a future lifestyle.

RW Lab is not only creating a digital nomad ecosystem, but also promoting a future lifestyle. 
In recent years, with the ups and downs of ecological changes, both the workplace environment and daily life need to be more "sustainable." 
Then, RW is an option for us. 
As long as we are self-motivated, sincere and altruistic enough, we will undoubtedly receive more inspiration and opportunities in the end.
hen-gao-xing-kan-dao-guo-nei-you-xiang-r:
It’s great to see that there are Chinese digital nomad communities like RW Lab in China that provide workers with information about remote work and lifestyle discussions. Through RW Lab, we feel more closely connected with the domestic digital nomad community. 
, allowing us to better understand and hear the voices of Chinese digital nomads.

practical explorer;

Legitimate companies won't charge job search fees, require you to purchase equipment in advance, or pay for training. 
Before clicking on any recruitment link, please double-check the domain name to make sure it is an official website. 
After clicking the "Apply" button, you will leave this website and jump to the recruitment company's application page or obtain other application contact information. 
This website is not responsible for any problems you encounter on external websites.

newHomePage.title: RW Digital Nomad Community - co-live, co-create
newHomePage.description: RW Lab is a co-creative digital nomad community that adheres to the DAO concept. Bringing interesting people together to create a cohesive community, building a platform for global digital nomads to explore collaboratively, self-create, and ultimately achieve self-realization, forming a digital nomad ecosystem for everyone to enjoy a comfortable and free work-life style!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Have other questions? Contact our community assistant Dora on WeChat (Nomad-Era)
faq.question1: Does RW offer other services besides recruitment?
faq.answer1: RW provides services including remote job seeking, remote skills training courses, global travel visa consulting, global tax planning consulting, and digital nomad co-living activities. RW hopes to become the preferred "work-life" platform for global digital nomads - following RW is all you need as a digital nomad!
faq.question2: How to join RW WeChat community?
faq.answer2: Add community assistant Dora on WeChat (Nomad-Era) and tell her you want to join the discussion group.
faq.question3: We have recruitment needs. What is the process for posting job information?
faq.answer3: After registering an account, go to the remote work page and click the publish button to post directly. Community reviewers will review your job information within 24 hours after you complete the posting. If the information is complete and accurate, it will be displayed in the website list.
faq.question4: Is there a fee for posting remote work recruitment information?
faq.answer4: Posting jobs on the website is free. If you need the community to help you increase job exposure or use the community talent pool for urgent recruitment, please contact our community assistant Dora on WeChat (Nomad-Era) to inquire about corresponding paid services.
faq.question5: I want to find a remote job. How do I submit my resume?
faq.answer5: After registering an account, go to the remote work page, search and subscribe to your desired job tags, and receive the latest and most matching job recommendations every day!
faq.question6: Should I use a Chinese resume, English resume, or both when submitting my resume?
faq.answer6: If the job description is in English, please use an English resume. If the job description is in Chinese, then use a Chinese resume.

testimonial.title: Community Stories
testimonial.subtitle: What community members say about RW
testimonial.story1: It might sound cliché, but it truly felt like fate when I stumbled upon RW Lab. Connecting with so many inspiring minds sparked something unstoppable—the idea of remote work took root, leading me to not just one, but multiple remote roles. It launched me into a refreshing semi-nomadic lifestyle and allowed me to witness countless fellow nomads embark on their own journeys. It's that rare resonance when frequencies align. Rooted in my own genuine experience, I believe RW Lab can be both a telescope to expand your horizons and a magnifying glass for self-reflection—helping you achieve a more fulfilled version of yourself, inside and out.
testimonial.story2: In the summer of 2022, I discovered RW Lab on social media, and that's when this collective remote story began. In the community, I met passionate ecosystem builders and highly skilled members; we discuss the richness and diversity of work and life 24/7. Beyond that, we receive high-quality remote job listings daily and weekly, enjoying ever-evolving digital nomad services on demand... RW Lab isn't just building a digital nomad ecosystem—it's championing a future lifestyle. These past few years have shown that sustainability is essential, whether in our careers or daily lives. RW Lab offers us that choice. As long as we're self-driven, sincere, and altruistic, we'll inevitably gain more inspiration and opportunities. RW Lab isn't just building a digital nomad ecosystem—it's championing a future lifestyle.
testimonial.story3: I'm thrilled to see a Chinese-language digital nomad community like RW Lab providing Chinese workers with remote work resources and lifestyle discussions. It makes us feel more connected to the digital nomad community in China, helping us better understand and hear the voices of Chinese digital nomads.
testimonial.story4: RW not only provides a platform for companies to hire remotely, but also gives job seekers another option to find work—creating a true win-win situation.
